positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial landscape at dawn. The scene features large, overlapping rings of planets and moons in muted pastel tones (lavender, peach, deep cerulean) against a deep indigo night sky. Central to the composition is a stylized, single crescent moon emitting soft, warm light, casting subtle shadows on highly detailed nebulae swirls. The overall aesthetic is Art Deco inspired, minimalist yet complex, using strong geometric shapes and clean silhouettes. Focus on high contrast between the dark background and the brightly lit celestial objects. The image must be designed to be seamlessly printed on fabric, maintaining clear lines and distinct color blocking. Vector art quality, highly detailed lines, symmetrical composition, 8K resolution.
negative: artifacts, blurry, low resolution, noise, jpeg artifacts, watermarks, text, logo, signature, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grain, clutter, photographic, realistic, 3d render
